headline: Xbox's 'reset': all the news about Microsoft's looming layoffs and studio closures
summary: Xbox warns staff of an upcoming 'reset' due to significant business challenges. This includes looming layoffs and potential studio closures. CEO Asha Sharma and CCO Matt Booty announced the changes in a memo.

headline: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX's AI phone prototype
summary: Elon Musk labels reports of a SpaceX AI phone prototype as 'utterly false'. The Wall Street Journal claimed SpaceX showcased a 'handset-like prototype'. The alleged device was described as 'slimmer than an iPhone'.

headline: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
summary: Krafton settles a lengthy $250 million dispute with Unknown Worlds Entertainment. The settlement includes bonus payments for the Subnautica 2 developer's staff. The conflict arose after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds' cofounders and CEO.

headline: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
summary: Xbox is reportedly developing a disc-to-digital conversion feature. This would allow users to digitize their physical game collections. The move comes as Microsoft may phase out physical disc production.

headline: Ex-Modern Warfare Creative Strategist Launches New Studio, Pushing Back Against Live Service Trends
summary: Robert Bowling, ex-Modern Warfare strategist, launches a new studio. The studio aims to challenge current destructive gaming trends. It specifically pushes back against live service models.

headline: Save 43% off the Garmin Forerunner 265 Smartwatch Ahead of the 4th of July at AliExpress
summary: Get 43% off the Garmin Forerunner 265 Smartwatch. This limited-time deal is available at AliExpress. The promotion runs ahead of the 4th of July.

headline: Amazon's Audible Prime Day Deal Ends on July 5: Pay Just $1 Per Month and Get $20 in Audible Credit
summary: Amazon Audible offers a Prime Day deal: $1 per month. Subscribers also receive $20 in Audible credit. The promotion concludes on July 5th.

headline: Walmart Has the Lowest Price on a GeForce RTX 5070 Prebuilt Gaming PC in 2026
summary: Walmart offers the lowest price on a GeForce RTX 5070 prebuilt gaming PC. The CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme features the new Intel Arrow Lake Refresh CPU. This gaming PC deal is available now.

headline: Watch full highlights as England come from behind to beat DR Congo
summary: England staged a comeback victory against DR Congo. Harry Kane scored two goals in the World Cup match. England now faces Mexico in the last-16.

headline: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'
summary: A 2-year-old Venezuelan boy, Kleiber Moran, was rescued after an earthquake. He was pulled from rubble six days after the deadly tremors. His aunt pledges to provide him with 'mother's warmth'.

headline: Badenoch accuses Starmer of leaving defence spending 'mess' for Burnham
summary: Kemi Badenoch criticized Keir Starmer over defence spending. She claims a £5bn shortfall in the defence investment plan. Badenoch calls it a 'mess' left for Burnham.

headline: Bibles, Home Alone and perfume: Six surprising ways Trump made money in 2025
summary: Donald Trump made billions in 2025 through diverse ventures. These included sales of Bibles, 'Home Alone' merchandise, and perfume. Official documents detail the surprising income streams during his return to the White House.
